pi_items.metadata_value: Drums must be Upstage (visually above) Vocals
pi_items.verified_value: DRUMS: Upstage Center; LEAD VOCALS: Downstage Center
pi_items.source: Technical spec created by setup_task.sh lines 20 and 31. Upstage (back of stage) is above Downstage (front of stage) in standard stage plot orientation.

pi_items.metadata_value: Keys (Stage Right) must be to the left of Guitar (Stage Left)
pi_items.verified_value: KEYS: Stage Right (Audience Left); GUITAR: Stage Left (Audience Right)
pi_items.source: Technical spec lines 25 and 28. Stage Right = Audience Left = left side of diagram; Stage Left = Audience Right = right side of diagram.

pi_items.metadata_value: Equipment models mentioned are realistic professional audio gear
pi_items.verified_value: All equipment verified as real: Ampeg SVT (real bass amp), Fender Twin Reverb (real guitar amp), Nord Stage 3 (real keyboard), Shure Beta 52A (real kick drum mic), SM57 (real Shure mic), SM58 (real Shure mic)
pi_items.source: Web searches verified: Ampeg SVT (Wikipedia, Sweetwater); Fender Twin Reverb (Fender official, Wikipedia); Nord Stage 3 (Nord official); Shure Beta 52A (Shure official); SM57/SM58 (professional audio standards)

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic technical specification file with hardcoded band requirements (NEON VELVET) containing realistic professional audio equipment (Ampeg SVT bass amp, Fender Twin Reverb guitar amp, Nord Stage 3 keyboard, Shure microphones including SM57, SM58, and Beta 52). The technical spec includes proper stage positioning (Drums Upstage Center, Vocals Downstage Center, Keys Stage Right, Guitar Stage Left) and a 16-channel input list. The task expects a drawio file saved as 'neon_velvet_rider.drawio' and PDF export as 'neon_velvet_rider.pdf'. All required text items are present in the generated specification. Discrepancy noted: The metadata's 'required_text' does not fully match the keywords the verifier.py script checks for (verifier additionally checks for 'Kick', 'Snare', 'Ampeg', 'Fender' not listed in metadata). The draw.io version 26.0.9 was verified to exist on GitHub releases.
